instagram.header: 🔗 Link in bio → Start your journey in the Thalassa realm
instagram.caption: Meet the Shipwreck Scavenger. 🌊 A survivor of the tides, this Thalassa scout turns the decay of the Aether Bleed into pure strength. With its Corroded Repair ability, it regains health every turn, growing stronger as it pushes past its limits. Will you add this survivor to your deck? ⚔️
instagram.alt_text: A dark fantasy illustration of the Shipwreck Scavenger unit from the Thalassa realm, featuring a weathered scavenger amidst coastal ruins.

facebook.body: In the crumbling outskirts of the Thalassa realm, where the salt water meets the encroaching corruption of the Void, scavengers pick through the remains of sunken civilizations. The Shipwreck Scavenger is one such soul, adapted to the harsh conditions of the Aether Bleed. By utilizing its unique Corroded Repair technique, this scout doesn't just survive—it thrives. At the end of every turn, it mends its wounds, and when pushed to its peak capacity, the overabundance of vitality translates into raw combat power on the field. How would you utilize this regenerator in your current deck configuration? Let us know your strategy for handling persistent units in the comment section below.
facebook.link_cta: Build your deck and explore the lore of the Elemental Quadrant here:

discord.content:
**Card Spotlight: Shipwreck Scavenger** 

From the depths of Thalassa comes a scout that refuses to stay down. 

- **Role:** Scout / Regenerator 
- **Cost:** 3 Mana 
- **Stats:** 3/2 
- **Ability: Corroded Repair** — Regenerate: This unit restores 2 Health at the end of each turn. If this unit is healed while at full health, gain +1 Attack. 

Keep your board presence secure and scale your pressure with this relentless survivor. 

[Play VOIDBORN now](https://voidborn.fun)
